scope: Current fix5 delayed chain only: buildup RPIP -> ground-state/NUBASE correction -> per-family TT division -> exact-position M sampling -> Cosima delayed transport SE/ID/TE -> Step05 selected delayed cps -> PI-02 convergence.
overall_summary: No current-fix5 processing, sampling, half-life, unit, or Step05 rate-conversion bug was found that can suppress the delayed selected cps by O(10-100).

fixed_total_activity_Bq.answer: The value is the ground-state-corrected fixed source total activity, source_fix_summary.json#/new_total_activity_Bq, copied into the exact-position manifest as fixed_total_activity_Bq and split evenly over 50000 PointSource blocks.

evidence.value: new_activity_by_key accumulates activity_after_exposure(nprod, tt_by_tag[tag], NUBASE half_life_s, t_flight_days).
new_total_activity_Bq is the sum of surviving new_flux_by_name values.

per_family_division.answer: Division is correct for the current full-stat fix5 delayed source: every particle family has division equal to its buildup file count, and scaled RP totals equal raw totals divided by division.

evidence.value: gamma auto division resolves to file_count; non-gamma division uses configured value.
scaled_val = raw_val / div; rp_raw_total and rp_scaled_total are audited.

warnings.value: tag=muminus TT spread is 0.0352; rate uses mean TT
tag=muplus TT spread is 0.026; rate uses mean TT

half_life_source_and_material_changes.answer: Half-lives come from the local archived NUBASE2020 file inputs/nubase/nubase_2020.txt, using ground-state records only. Material changes are expected long-lived ground-state corrections: Nb-94, Al-26, Ni-59, and W-180 are strongly reduced; W-187/W-185/W-181 and dominant I-128/Al-28/Cu-64 rows remain effectively scale 1.

evidence.value: NUBASE parser skips non-ground states and parses fixed-width half-life fields.
W-180 0.01425438375 -> 2.5519832357038237e-22 Bq; action removed_negligible_or_stable; NUBASE line 4013, 1.59 Ey.
W-187, W-185, W-181 are scale approximately 1 with half-lives 23.809 h, 75.1 d, 120.956 d.

exactpos_m50000_activity_preservation.answer: M=50000 equal-flux PointSource sampling preserves total activity in the manifest exactly and in source text to 4.53631512934923e-10 relative error; unsampled rare-nuclide activity fraction is 0.0001463401094264377.

evidence.value: point weights are activity(VN,ZA) * wfile / denom.

delayed_selected_cps_from_events_and_TE.answer: The selected delayed cps is selected_events / TE_s after Step05 W2, active-veto, and side-entry Compton/FoV selection. Current full-stat production sample: 30 selected events / 11649.564832 s = 0.0025752034889400762 cps.

evidence.value: delayed_time_s reads TE_s from the delayed transport summary.
summarize_window sums cat['rate_hz'] for final selected events.

suspected_O10_to_O100_suppressor.answer: No current-fix5 processing bug or mismatch capable of suppressing delayed by O(10-100) was found.
supporting_evidence: NUBASE line/unit audit PASS with zero mismatches.
Exactpos sampling preserves source activity and misses only 0.0146% rare-nuclide activity.
Step05 delayed selected rate exactly equals selected events divided by TE_s.
W/collimator selected W2 delayed events are zero, while source-level W/collimator activity is audited at about 1.15% of fixed source activity.
PI-02 convergence is DONE with 103 combined selected events and <10% relative uncertainty.

warnings.name: TE_vs_source_flux_offset
warnings.value: 1e6 / 11649.564832 = 85.8401162980025 s^-1, which is 1.0045748087 times fixed_total_activity_Bq=85.44920253876245. This inflates, not suppresses, the TE-based delayed cps by about 0.46%.

warnings.name: w_activation_audit_rerun_path_stale
warnings.value: STEP05_SCRIPT points to code/tools/build_v3p5_centerfinger_step05_l1_response.py, which is absent; old/code/tools/build_v3p5_centerfinger_step05_l1_response.py exists. Existing artifact still matches Step05.

answer: Compare source activity totals before/after ground-state correction, including fixed_total_activity_Bq.
Compare per-family files, division, TT sums/means, raw/scaled RP totals, and any TT-spread warnings.
Compare half-life archive/source, NUBASE line/value/unit, and correction rows for I-128, Al-28, Cu-64, Nb-94, Al-26, Ni-59, W-180, W-187, W-185, and W-181.
Compare exact-position/source-position method: M, PointSource vs compressed source, source flux conservation, missed activity, RPIP support, and geometry provenance.
Compare delayed transport source triggers, SE, ID, TS, TE_s, generated_decays/TE_s, source-card geometry, and SIM header geometry.
Compare Step05 selection: W2 window, active-veto threshold, side-entry Compton/FoV policy, direct selected cps versus common-time-axis product, and selected event counts.
Compare W/collimator source activity and selected W2 delayed events/rate.
Compare PI-02 or equivalent convergence support: independent samplings, combined selected events, combined rate, sigma, relative uncertainty, and provenance.

evidence.value: Four same-inventory M50000 exact-position runs, selected events 30/18/20/35, all provenance_status=PASS.
combined_rate = total_events / total_TE_s; combined_sigma = sqrt(total_events) / total_TE_s.

top_findings.finding: No O(10-100) current-fix5 delayed-rate suppressor was found.
fixed_total_activity_Bq is 85.44920253876245 Bq and is preserved through M=50000 exact-position source construction.
Per-family division is correct and closes exactly for all audited buildup families.
NUBASE2020 ground-state handling is audited; material changes are expected long-lived corrections, not hidden suppression.
Step05 uses TE_s for selected delayed cps; the TE/source-flux offset is about +0.46% in rate, not a suppressor.
